description_long: This bungalow features a modern, open-plan layout with large windows that allow ample natural light into the living spaces. The structure is primarily white with wood accents, and includes a spacious outdoor terrace equipped with a dining area and a large umbrella for shade. The interior is visible through the windows, revealing a living room, kitchen, and dining area, all designed with contemporary furnishings. The roof is flat, contributing to the modern aesthetic, and the exterior walls are smooth and clean. The windows are arranged in both grouped and individual patterns, enhancing the visual interest of the facade. The overall design emphasizes comfort, functionality, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with large windows, a flat roof, and a spacious outdoor terrace with dining area and umbrella.
description_view_0: This view highlights the large windows and the open living area, with a clear look into the interior spaces and the connection to the outdoor terrace.
description_view_1: This angle shows the kitchen and dining area, as well as the terrace with its outdoor furniture and umbrella, emphasizing the indoor-outdoor flow.
description_view_2: The terrace and outdoor dining area are most prominent here, with the umbrella and railing clearly visible, and a partial view into the living spaces.
description_view_3: This side reveals the living room with large windows and indoor plants, as well as the overall length of the bungalow and the terrace extending from the main structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows
